_description: Short-form productivity content: 35-45s, portrait 9:16, punchy narration, bottom subtitles
script_prompt_template: Write exactly {word_count_min} to {word_count_max} words total. No more. Start with a strong hook sentence that grabs attention immediately. Use short, punchy sentences throughout. Sound like a confident voiceover narrator, not an essay. No motivational cliches. No filler openers (In today's world, Have you ever wondered). No markdown, no titles, no formatting. Plain narration text only.
